comments.body: We have upgraded our Cycle Trading Signal process by integrating advanced momentum triggers and refined pullback logic. Building on a proven 70%+ accuracy baseline, our latest enhancements are specifically designed to increase predictive accuracy on a 24-hour rolling basis. Starting Monday, we will initiate a day-by-day analysis to monitor the impact on our interday success rate."

comments.author: Patient-Knowledge915
comments.body:
The Cycle Trading Signal Process
​Methodology: Our predictive model for Monday’s session is driven by the Cycle Trading Signal Process, a multi-layered technical framework designed for high-precision entries. The system generates predictions by synthesizing three core components:
​Primary Cycle Analysis: Identifies the underlying market rhythm to forecast price direction.
​Built-in Momentum Trigger: A proprietary "Buy" signal that activates only when upward velocity is confirmed.
​Integrated Pullback Logic: Specifically engineered to capitalize on temporary price dips, ensuring entries are positioned for maximum continuation.
​The Monday Objective: By utilizing these newly enhanced features, we have identified 5 specific stocks poised for immediate continuation. We are tracking these positions from Friday’s close to Monday’s 4:00 PM bell to validate the increased accuracy of the system.
